330 GG0170C1_STTG_BED_SIDE_STRT_CD GG0170C1_STTG_BED_SIDE_STRT_CD GG0170C1 Admission Performance Lying to Sit Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to safely go from lying on the bed to sitting on the side of the bed, with feet flat on the floor and no back support at the time of admission.
